text:
Hypnos loved moonlight. He thought it was the most beautiful thing ever.

One night he ventured outside into the darkest moonlight. There was something magical about it he couldn't quite explain. He moved slowly through the night, feeling the light embrace him.

Suddenly, he stumbled upon a clearing. In the middle was a young girl, perhaps 12. She looked frightened but gentle. There were stars scattered around.

"Hyrhxophiles favoruatellan you?

That's a hard name to pronounce. I'm afraid I'll jump hop hop hop...

Just stay calm. I will make you sleepy...You just close your eyes..."

Hypnos?

Yes.

Just relax.

With that, an odd silence enveloped them both. Her body seemed to shrink. Stars drifted slowly past.

Moments seemed to lapse...then sleep.

When she finally blinked open her eyes...

...

...

...

...

...the girl wasn't quite herself. Dreams?

Of moonlit owls?

Or?

"...
